SourceProxy.label: SHYX Adaptive Isotropic Remesher
SourceProxy.name: SHYXAdaptiveIsotropicRemesher

Documentation.short_help: Curvature-aware CGAL remesh with min/max edge length.

SourceProxy.Documentation:
Adaptive isotropic remeshing using CGAL Adaptive_sizing_field (discrete curvature). Edge lengths are bounded by Min/Max Edge Length; Adaptive Tolerance controls fineness together with curvature. With a non-empty vtkSelection on input port 1, only those faces are remeshed; otherwise the whole surface is remeshed. Edges on the boundary between selected and unselected triangles are constrained as CGAL feature edges (also used for the optional smooth_shape vertex pinning, together with angle-based sharp edges).
Post-remesh smooth_shape uses the same Protection Angle for sharp edges; with Feature Mask enabled it re-evaluates the same array/threshold on the remeshed surface (after attribute interpolation) to clip features and to mark mask-region boundaries.
Outputs: 0 Remeshed (and optionally shape-smoothed) surface. 1 Sharp/feature edges (lines) and (only if Shape Smooth Iterations > 0) the constrained feature points (verts). 2 Input geometry, faces passing the feature mask threshold. 3 Remeshed geometry, faces passing the feature mask threshold (mask patch on output).
Requires CGAL 6.0+.

InputProperty.name: Selection
InputProperty.label: Selection
InputProperty.Documentation: Optional vtkSelection. When present and non-empty, CGAL remeshing is applied only to the indicated faces (same convention as SHYX Delete Selected Cells). If the port is unset or the selection yields no cells, the whole surface is remeshed. The boundary between selected and non-selected faces is also constrained as feature edges for remesh and smooth_shape (with Protection Angle / Feature Mask rules).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: MinEdgeLength
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Min edge length
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Minimum edge length; must be > 0. ParaView BoundsDomain (scaled_extent 0.001) suggests 0.1% of the input axis-aligned bounding box longest side; use Scale/Reset next to the property.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: MaxEdgeLength
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Max edge length

DoubleVectorProperty.name: AdaptiveTolerance
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Adaptive tolerance
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL Adaptive_sizing_field tolerance. Smaller values tend to refine more within the Min/Max edge length bounds.

IntVectorProperty.name: NumberOfRelaxationSteps
IntVectorProperty.label: Relaxation steps
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL vertex-relocation steps per remesh iteration (higher = smoother surface; 0 disables relaxation).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: ProtectAngle
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Protection angle
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Sharp-edge angle threshold in degrees (CGAL detect_sharp_edges). Endpoints of detected sharp edges are protected during remesh and pinned during smooth_shape.

IntVectorProperty.name: SharpFeatureSideFilter
IntVectorProperty.label: Sharp side filter
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Optional filter on interior sharp edges after CGAL detect_sharp_edges, using signed dihedral angle (approximate_dihedral_angle). Excludes concave (signed < 0) or convex (signed > 0) from remesh / shape constraints and from port 1. Boundary edges are unchanged. If convex/concave looks swapped, flip mesh orientation or pick the other entry.

IntVectorProperty.name: FeatureMaskEnabled
IntVectorProperty.label: Use feature mask
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When ON: threshold input faces to port 2; port 1 sharp features are computed only on that patch; on the full surface, sharp edges are intersected with the mask for CGAL remesh / smooth_shape. Choose a point- or cell-centered array, a threshold (tuple magnitude > threshold), and the optional All Scalars flag for point arrays.

StringVectorProperty.name: FeatureMaskArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Array
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Name of a point- or cell-centered array. If both exist with the same name, cell data is used. Tuple magnitude must be > Threshold for a cell (or per-point corner) to pass.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: FeatureMaskThreshold
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Threshold
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Cells pass when tuple magnitude is strictly greater than this value (scalar or vector magnitude). Typical: 0 to keep values > 0.

IntVectorProperty.name: FeatureMaskAllScalars
IntVectorProperty.label: All scalars
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When the chosen array is point-centered: if ON, every corner of a cell must pass the magnitude test; if OFF, one passing corner is enough (vtkThreshold-style). Ignored when the array resolves to cell data.

IntVectorProperty.name: RemeshProtectConstraints
IntVectorProperty.label: Protect constraints
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL `protect_constraints`. When ON, feature edges are neither split nor collapsed. When OFF, constrained edges may be split or collapsed per CGAL (subject to Collapse constraints below).

IntVectorProperty.name: RemeshCollapseConstraints
IntVectorProperty.label: Collapse constraints
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL `collapse_constraints`. When Protect constraints is OFF, allows collapsing constrained edges. Ignored by CGAL when Protect constraints is ON.

IntVectorProperty.name: RemeshRelaxConstraints
IntVectorProperty.label: Relax constraints
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL `relax_constraints`. When ON, endpoints of constrained and boundary edges may move along constrained polylines during tangential relaxation.

IntVectorProperty.name: ShapeSmoothingIterations
IntVectorProperty.label: Iterations
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Post-remesh CGAL smooth_shape iterations. 0 disables. Sharp-edge vertices (Protection Angle) and Feature-Mask boundary vertices stay fixed.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: ShapeSmoothingTimeStep
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Time step
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL smooth_shape time step (smoothing speed). Typical range about 1e-6 to 1. Used only when Shape-smoothing Iterations > 0.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseUpdateAttributes
IntVectorProperty.label: Interpolate attributes
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, point/cell data are interpolated onto the new mesh.
